About Us

Welcome To PATRIOT POOL & SPA

Providing you with the best pool and spa maintenance services for over 30 years so you can enjoy your time in the sun.

At Patriot Pool & Spa, business is personal. Our well-trained team has the experience needed to provide the safe and thorough service your pool requires. We know that your time is valuable, so schedule online or give us a call and we’ll take care of the rest. Worry-free cleaning, repairs, and consultation is the Patriot Pool & Spa difference. Try us out today.
Learn More
866-415-5379

Pool Pump Savings Calculator

The Pool Pump Savings Calculator from Pentair helps homeowners estimate potential savings by upgrading to an energy-efficient pool pump. By inputting details about your current pool pump and usage, the calculator provides an estimate of energy cost reductions and highlights the environmental benefits of switching to a more efficient model, allowing you to make an informed decision about pool pump upgrades.
Calculate your savings

What Makes Us Different

Why Choose PATRIOT POOL & SPA

Easy Scheduling & Fair Pricing

Friendly Team Of Technicians

Safe & Thorough Service

Effortless Payment & Reporting

Give us a call today for a free, no obligation estimate.

866-415-5379

“We make pool ownership easy - so you can focus on what matters”

Patriot Pool and Spa ensures effortless enjoyment of your pool through exceptionally high-quality service, delivered by the most trustworthy technicians. We make your pool sparkle, protect your investment, and keep you in the loop, every step of the way. Owning a pool has never been easier.

High-Quality Service

We deliver the best quality pool maintenance and cleaning service in the industry, ensuring that your pool is always sparkling clean.

  • Consistent weekly maintenance based on our 8-step process & Pool Vision TM training curriculum
  • Technicians on standby to tackle any issue the moment it appears
  • Long-term stability of service, giving you peace of mind

Learn More

Technicians You Can Trust

Your backyard is an extension of your home. We only hire technicians you can trust to protect you, your family, and your pool.

  • Dedicated, background-checked technicians who build trust
  • Industry-leading Pool VisionTM trained techs with deep expertise
  • Investment and commitment to deliver the safest service

Learn More

Clear, Proactive Communication

Wondering if your pool is ready to be enjoyed is not an option. We make sure you know the who, what, when; every step of the way.

  • Personalized service that exceeds expectations
  • Clear, detailed service reports and proactive updates
  • Easy, open interactions with techs and our office team
  • Educational onboarding and on-going guidance

Learn More

Protection For Your Investment

We know that pool ownership is an investment. Our mission drives us to give you confidence your investment is secure.

  • Honest diagnostics and proactive partnering to solve problems
  • Proactive maintenance to protect your equipment
  • Innovative approaches to save you money now and in the future

Learn More

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

Having been loyal to our previous pool cleaning company for 5 years (having a newly built pool) we had nothing to compare it to. Service was acceptable(ish), but not exceptional. Creeping the neighbors pool company (Patriot) and seeing how they stuck around for more than 5 minutes and actually cleaned the pool made us jealous! So a quick call and boom! Regular rotation and service. We now feel that (as the pool ages) we’re in good hands and issues will be brought to our attention instead of ignored. Our pool went from GA to VIP! Thanks Patriot! Update! After 10 years with our Jandy pool pump, it retired. Kemp Neyman with Patriot Pool came out to asses the situation, thoroughly explained what was required, reviewed pricing and within a splash we were humming. Feels great to know we’re in great, trustworthy hands when a more serious need arises! And we’re still getting our pool serviced weekly! Looks amazing all year around! Thanks Patriot!...
Via Google
Dahlia Guerrero
He was so kind to come back out in the rain and check to make sure my valves were in the right place.
Via Google
Lindsey Humphrey
Caleb takes good care of our pool.
Via Google
Dr. Jona Croston (Renee')
If you need pool repair, look no further! We received outstanding service from our first contact. Elizabeth did a fantastic job communicating with me regarding equipment details and cost. I think every email was answered with 15 minutes. Once we made the decision to get new pool equipment (ours was 11 years old and not maintained well) the techs who did the work were both polite and skilled. Juan and Patrick completed the job, showed us how to operate everything and the equipment is functioning as promised. Fantastic experience. Wish we would have found Patriot earlier - we won't use anyone else. Thank you!...
Via Google
Laurie Serafine
Patrick came over to help me with some user-error questions I had. Punctual, personable, an expert in all things pool. In fact, all the equipment guys I can think of in addition to Patrick - Dan, Manuel, Chris - have all been great....
Via Google

Omar Villalobos with Patriot pools does great work and is highly professional.

With Patriot Pool & Spa, you get more than just weekly pool cleaning. Our comprehensive packages cover all the necessary bases for pool care. Trust our expert team of pool technicians to ensure each service is completed to the highest standard. Contact us today for all your pool service needs. We can’t wait to help!
